title: Xaero Seedmap
description: completes the map using the world's seed
body:
This mod enhances Xaero’s World Map by intelligently filling in unexplored areas using the world’s seed. Instead of the default black or empty regions where the player hasn’t traveled yet, the map is dynamically generated to display terrain as if it had already been explored.

By leveraging the world seed, the mod can accurately predict and render biomes, terrain shapes, and even certain naturally generated structures. This creates a seamless, fully populated map experience from the very beginning, allowing players to plan journeys, locate interesting areas, and understand their world at a glance—without needing to physically explore every chunk first.

In addition to terrain generation, the mod also visualizes select structures (such as villages, temples, or other seed-determined features), giving players valuable insight into potential points of interest. The result is a more informative and immersive mapping system that feels complete, responsive, and far more useful for exploration, navigation, and strategy.
